title: Crucial
description: The simplest way to manage a minecraft server!
body:
# Crucial
**Crucial** is a Minecraft plugin designed for simple server management. It offers a more straightforward approach compared to EssentialsX. It is ideal for server owners who want to play with friends while still having some control over the server.

The plugin allows for easy manipulation of the time of day, weather, and fly.

This plugin may cause conflicts if you use this plugin alongside EssentialsX || CMI

# Permissions
- **crucial.gmc** - Allows players to go into Creative
- **crucial.gms** - Allows players to go into Survival
- **crucial.gmsp** - Allows players to go into Spectator
- **crucial.gma** - Allows players to go into Adventure

- **crucial.day** - Allows players to switch time to Day
- **crucial.night** - Allows players to switch time to Night

- **crucial.sun** - Allows players to switch the weather to Sunny
- **crucial.rain** - Allows players to switch the weather to Raining
- **crucial.thunder** - Allows players to switch the weather to Thunder

- **crucial.fly** - Allows players to fly

# Other

```
Keep in mind that this is my first plugin,
so you may encounter some issues. Documentation will be available soon.
```
